decoder_heading: We use Google Analytics and Firebase Crashlytics services to collect anonymous information about the usage and performance of this app, such as app launches, clicks, sessions duration and bug reports with the only purpose of improving our services quality.

decoder_heading: About user data and Cloud Backups
ident_heading: About user data and Cloud Backups
heading_content_part: About user data and Cloud Backups

decoder_heading: When using HabitNow as a non-premium user we do not store any of the user data in any server. All data provided to HabitNow is only stored in your device and our development team can not access to it.
ident_heading: When using HabitNow as a non-premium user we do not store any of the user data in any server. All data provided to HabitNow is only stored in your device and our development team can not access to it.

decoder_heading: We use a third-party cloud based service to store premium user backups. Backup files are stored pseudonimously and its data is obfuscated. These files are protected by security rules that prevent the access of unauthorized or malicious users. We will never share or sell its data to any third-party entity.
